series_metadata.series_title: TRANSCRIPTS PUBLIC HEARINGS FOR FIRE CODES

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: hard copy microfilmed. microfilm has been checked quality and completeness ; Microform: diazo copy in operating area permanently. master microfilm in off-site storage permanently
